prestazioni: Replace the stock W-series 409 cubic-inch (6.7L) engine (engine code: **W-409**) with a forged rotating assembly featuring a **Callies Compstar 4340 forged crankshaft** (4.312" stroke), **Manley 4340 forged H-beam connecting rods**, and **JE 13.5:1 compression forged pistons** (PN: 261850) for a 454 cubic-inch (7.4L) stroker build. Pair with a **Crane Cams solid-lifter camshaft** (PN: 114021, 280° duration @ 0.050", 0.580" lift) and **Crower stainless steel roller rockers** (1.7:1 ratio) for aggressive valvetrain performance.

Install a **Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetor** (PN: 0-80731) with **Quick Fuel Technology billet metering blocks** and **Wilson Manifolds 2x4 intake manifold** (PN: WM-409-2X4) for optimized airflow. Pair with a **MSD Pro-Billet HEI distributor** (PN: 8361) and **MSD 6AL ignition box** (PN: 6420) for precise spark control, complemented by **Taylor 8.8mm ThunderVolt silicone spark plug wires**.

Upgrade the exhaust system with **Hooker Super Competition headers** (PN: 2206-1HKR, 2.25" primary tubes, 3.5" collectors) and a **Flowmaster 44 Series Delta Flow muffler** (PN: 817582, 3.5" inlet/outlet) for a deep, aggressive tone. Integrate a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** (PN: TKO-600-1A) with a **McLeod twin-disc clutch** (PN: 691002) and **Hurst Blackjack shifter** (PN: 391-0200) for precise gear engagement.
estetica: Apply a **PPG Hot Rod Black** (color code: 9300) paint scheme with **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** (color code: K01) scallops and **1/4" pinstriping by Steve’s Auto Restorations** for a period-correct yet aggressive look. Add **Detroit Speed billet aluminum door handles** (PN: 0101-0102) and **Vintage Air Gen-IV SureFit front runner A/C system** (PN: 37100-VUF) for a stealth OEM+ appearance.

Install a **Fiberglass Trends 1962-64 Biscayne fiberglass hood** (PN: FT-6264-HOOD) with a **3" cowl induction scoop** and **Billet Specialties Tru Trac hood hinges** (PN: 70000). Lower the stance with **Detroit Speed QUADRALink rear suspension** (PN: 011400) and **Ridetech HQ Series coilovers** (PN: 11140200) for adjustable ride height, paired with **Forgeline GA3R 18x9" wheels** (PN: GA3R-1890-5150) wrapped in **BFGoodrich g-Force Rival S 275/35R18 tires**.

Enhance the interior with **Recaro SRD front seats** (PN: 391.01.001) upholstered in **Saddle Tan leather by Katzkin** (PN: CHEVY62-001), a **Ididit tilt steering column** (PN: 151060001) with a **Grant Classic 3-spoke steering wheel** (PN: 33200), and a **Dakota Digital HDX instrument cluster** (PN: HDX-62C-CHEV) for modern precision with a vintage aesthetic.
